chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 3002 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No 12023/2017 2. For order on MA No 12024/2017 3. For katcha Peshi 14.02.2018. Mr. Meer Ahmed Mangrio Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w ASI Dhani Bukhsh PS.Daur on behalf of SHO PS.Daur Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari A.P.G -=-=- After hearing the learned counsel for the parties at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that since challan under crime No.96/2017 registered U/s 395, 337-L(ii) PPC at police station Daur, has already been submitted in the concerned court, therefore, he may be allowed to file proper proceedings for premature acquittal of petitioner from the trial court. Learned Asstt:A.G files comments of respondentNo.3 to 5, taken on recopy, copies whereby supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned Asstt:A.G and APG have raised their no objection on the above proposition. In view of above this constitutional petition stands disposed of. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to file proceedings for premature acquittal of the petitioner before the trial court, if he desires so and if such proceedings for premature acquittal of the petitioner is filed, the trial court shall decide the same in accordance with law. However, official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
